title: SIMPLE WebPlatform and Middleware
description: Web Application for monitoring and managing multiplayer connections to Gama Server simulation.

title: GAMA Platform
description: GAMA is an open-source, spatially explicit multi-agent simulation platform designed for modelling and simulating complex systems. I contribute to its core development, including agent-based modelling features, simulation infrastructure, and tooling for large-scale epidemiological and environmental simulations.

title: Auto Sci-Hub
description: Cross-Browser Plugin to open Sci-Hub page with the article from your current tab.
